metadata.name: Route0x
metadata.summary: Low latency, High Accuracy, Custom Query routers.

modules.name: route0x.route_builder
documentation: route0x/route_builder/__init__.py

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.outlier_detector.OutlierDetector.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the OutlierDetector with a SetFit model and a LOF model for outlier detection.

Args:
    setfit_model (SetFitModel): Pretrained SetFit model body to use for embedding extraction.
    contamination (float): Proportion of outliers in the data, between 0 and 1.
    output_dir (str): Directory where the model's components will be saved.
    n_neighbors (int): Number of neighbors to use for LOF (default is 20).

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.outlier_detector.OutlierDetector._train_isolation_forest
documentation: Train the Isolation Forest on embeddings extracted from the SetFit model.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.outlier_detector.OutlierDetector._train_lof
documentation: Train the Local Outlier Factor model on embeddings extracted from the SetFit model.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.outlier_detector.OutlierDetector._visualize_embeddings
documentation: Visualize embeddings using t-SNE and save the plot as a file.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.outlier_detector.OutlierDetector._save_lof_model
documentation: Since LOF cannot be used for prediction after training, we only save the embeddings if needed.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.outlier_detector.OutlierDetector._save_isolation_forest
documentation: Save the trained Isolation Forest model as a pickle file in the output directory.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.build_index
documentation:
Build a FAISS index from embeddings and save it to disk, along with the corresponding unique IDs and labels.

Args:
    embeddings (np.ndarray): The embeddings to index.
    ids (List[str]): The list of unique IDs corresponding to each embedding.
    labels (List[str]): The list of text labels corresponding to each embedding.
    index_file_path (str): The path where the index file will be saved.
    metric: FAISS metric for distance calculation (e.g., inner product for cosine similarity).

Returns:
    str: Path to the saved index file.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.load_index
documentation:
Load a FAISS index from disk.

Args:
    index_file_path (str): The path to the saved FAISS index file.

Returns:
    faiss.Index: The loaded FAISS index.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.load_labels
documentation:
Load the label dictionary from disk.

Args:
    label_file_path (str): The path to the saved label dictionary file.

Returns:
    dict: Dictionary of index-to-label mappings.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.load_metadata
documentation:
Load the metadata dictionary from disk, containing unique IDs and labels.

Args:
    metadata_file_path (str): The path to the saved metadata dictionary file.

Returns:
    dict: Dictionary of index-to-unique-ID-and-label mappings.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.search_index
documentation:
Search for the nearest neighbors using the FAISS index.

Args:
    query_embedding (np.ndarray): The embedding of the query.
    index (faiss.Index): The FAISS index to search in.
    num_neighbors (int): The number of nearest neighbors to retrieve.

Returns:
    np.ndarray: Indices of the nearest neighbors.
    np.ndarray: Distances to the nearest neighbors.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.get_labels_from_indices
documentation:
Retrieve the corresponding labels for the given indices using the label dictionary.

Args:
    indices (np.ndarray): Array of nearest neighbor indices.
    label_dict (dict): Dictionary of index-to-label mappings.

Returns:
    List[str]: List of corresponding labels for the nearest neighbors.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.get_metadata_from_indices
documentation:
Retrieve the corresponding unique IDs and labels for the given indices using the metadata dictionary.

Args:
    indices (np.ndarray): Array of nearest neighbor indices.
    metadata_dict (dict): Dictionary of index-to-unique-ID-and-label mappings.

Returns:
    List[dict]: List of dictionaries with 'id' and 'label' for each nearest neighbor.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.normalize_embeddings
documentation:
Normalize token embeddings to unit length along last axis.

Args:
    embeddings: Array of shape (..., embedding_dim)
    
Returns:
    Normalized embeddings with same shape

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.rerank_with_maxsim
documentation:
Rerank the top-K results using MaxSim based on token-level embeddings from an .npz file.

Args:
    query_token_embeddings (np.ndarray): The token-level embeddings of the query (shape: max_seq_len, embedding_dim).
    top_k_metadata (List[dict]): List of metadata for top-K items from FAISS, each containing 'id' and 'label'.
    token_embedding_file (str): Path to the .npz file containing token-level embeddings.

Returns:
    List[dict]: Reranked list of metadata dictionaries based on MaxSim.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.vector_db.VectorDB.majority_vote
documentation:
Perform majority voting on the labels of the reranked results.

Args:
    reranked_metadata (List[dict]): List of reranked metadata dictionaries, each containing 'label'.

Returns:
    str: The label with the majority vote.

documentation: Initializes and configures the tokenizer with padding and truncation.

documentation: Read the pooling strategy from the config file located in the Pooling folder.

documentation: Load the faiss index to memory

documentation: Load the calibrated classifier from the stored pickle file.

documentation: Load the classifier from the stored pickle file.

documentation: Load the LOF outlier detector from the stored pickle file.

methods.name: route0x.route_finder.route_finder.RouteFinder._cls_pooling
documentation: Extract the CLS token embedding (assumed to be the first token).

methods.name: route0x.route_finder.route_finder.RouteFinder._mean_pooling
documentation: Perform mean pooling on token embeddings, taking the attention mask into account.

methods.name: route0x.route_finder.route_finder.RouteFinder._get_embeddings
documentation: Use the ONNX model to get embeddings from the text input.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.Route.__init__
documentation: Represents a single route with its respective samples.

documentation: Represents a build request that contains multiple routes and their respective samples.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilderRequest.to_csv
documentation: Converts the request data into a CSV format with 'text' and 'label' columns.

documentation: Initializes the RouteBuilder with configuration parameters.

documentation: Sets up the logger for the RouteBuilder.

documentation: Detects the encoding of a file.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._load_data
documentation: Loads data from a file or Hugging Face dataset.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._load_hf_dataset
documentation: Loads a dataset from Hugging Face, samples it, and saves as CSV files with label mapping.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._assess_data
documentation: Assesses if the dataset has sufficient samples per class.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._split_synthetic_data
documentation:
Splits synthetic data into training and evaluation sets based on a minimum number of samples per label.
Ensures that user samples are always part of the training set.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._get_llm_provider
documentation: Returns the provider based on the family of models in the input string.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._generate_synthetic_queries
documentation: Generates synthetic queries using an LLM in N stages

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._generate_adversarial_samples
documentation: Generates adversarial samples using an LLM.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._generate_synthetic_test_queries
documentation: Generates synthetic test queries using an LLM

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._shuffle_dataset
documentation: Shuffles the dataset.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._train_and_evaluate
documentation: Trains and evaluates the model.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._save_checkpoint_results
documentation: Saves checkpoint results to the output directory.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._evaluate_model
documentation: Evaluates the model on the eval dataset.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._save_final_report
documentation: Saves the final report with hyperparameters and metrics.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._export_onnx
documentation: Exports the model to ONNX format.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._quantize_onnx_model
documentation: Quantizes the exported ONNX model to reduce size and improve inference speed.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._get_downloaded_models
documentation: Retrieves the list of downloaded models.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._check_and_pull_model
documentation: Checks if a model is downloaded and pulls it if not.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._is_local_llm_server_running
documentation: Checks if the local LLM server is running.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._detect_environment
documentation: Detects the execution environment.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._remove_exited_container
documentation: Removes the specified container if it is exited.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._start_llm_server
documentation: Starts the LLM server if it's not running.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._is_json_serializable
documentation: Check if an object is JSON serializable.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder._generate_natural_typo_variants
documentation:
Generate naturally typo-augmented versions of a given query.

Parameters:
    query (str): The original query.
    num_variants (int): Number of typo-augmented queries to generate.
    
Returns:
    List[str]: List of typo-augmented queries.

methods.name: route0x.route_builder.route_builder.RouteBuilder.build_routes
documentation: Builds the semantic query routes based on the provided configurations.
